description: Manage the editorial content calendar by creating scheduled posts and organizing existing content in WordPress. Create a new category called 'Editorial Picks'. Create three new posts with 'Scheduled' status and meaningful content: 'Weekly News Roundup: Tech Industry Updates' (Scheduled for January 15, 2026 at 9:00 AM, 'Editorial Picks' category), 'Interview: The Future of Digital Media' (Scheduled for January 16, 2026 at 10:30 AM, 'Editorial Picks' category), and 'Editorial: Why Open Source Matters' (Scheduled for January 17, 2026 at 8:00 AM, 'News' category). Update the existing post 'Getting Started with WordPress' to be 'sticky' and assigned to the 'Editorial Picks' category. Change the status of '10 Essential WordPress Plugins Every Site Needs' and 'The Art of Writing Engaging Blog Content' from Published to 'Draft' for editorial review. Ensure all dates and statuses are set accurately.

metadata.p1_title: Weekly News Roundup: Tech Industry Updates
metadata.p2_title: Interview: The Future of Digital Media
metadata.d1_title: 10 Essential WordPress Plugins Every Site Needs
metadata.d2_title: The Art of Writing Engaging Blog Content
